description: Infrastructure health monitoring for EC2 and MySQL database

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) as connections FROM information_schema.PROCESSLIST
SELECT CAST(VARIABLE_VALUE AS UNSIGNED) as queries FROM performance_schema.global_status WHERE VARIABLE_NAME = 'Questions'
SELECT CAST(VARIABLE_VALUE AS UNSIGNED) as slow FROM performance_schema.global_status WHERE VARIABLE_NAME = 'Slow_queries'

SELECT ROUND((1 - ((SELECT VARIABLE_VALUE FROM performance_schema.global_status WHERE VARIABLE_NAME = 'Innodb_buffer_pool_reads') / (SELECT VARIABLE_VALUE FROM performance_schema.global_status WHERE VARIABLE_NAME = 'Innodb_buffer_pool_read_requests'))) * 100, 1) as hit_ratio
SELECT ID, USER, HOST, DB, COMMAND, TIME, STATE, LEFT(INFO, 200) as INFO FROM information_schema.PROCESSLIST WHERE COMMAND != 'Sleep' AND INFO IS NOT NULL AND TIME > 1 ORDER BY TIME DESC LIMIT 15
SELECT COUNT(*) as long_queries FROM information_schema.PROCESSLIST WHERE TIME > 30 AND COMMAND != 'Sleep'
SELECT COUNT(*) as waiting FROM information_schema.PROCESSLIST WHERE STATE LIKE '%lock%' OR STATE LIKE '%waiting%'
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(TIME), 0) as longest FROM information_schema.PROCESSLIST WHERE COMMAND != 'Sleep' AND INFO IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) as active FROM information_schema.PROCESSLIST WHERE COMMAND != 'Sleep'

SELECT TABLE_NAME as table_name, TABLE_ROWS as row_count, ROUND(DATA_LENGTH / 1024 / 1024, 2) as size_mb, ROUND(INDEX_LENGTH / 1024 / 1024, 2) as index_size_mb FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() ORDER BY DATA_LENGTH DESC
SELECT ROUND(SUM(DATA_LENGTH + INDEX_LENGTH) / 1024 / 1024, 2) as total_size FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()
SELECT COUNT(*) as table_count FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()
SELECT SUM(TABLE_ROWS) as total_rows FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()
SELECT ROUND(SUM(INDEX_LENGTH) / 1024 / 1024, 2) as index_size FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()
SELECT ID, USER, HOST, DB, COMMAND, TIME, STATE, LEFT(INFO, 150) as INFO FROM information_schema.PROCESSLIST ORDER BY TIME DESC LIMIT 50

title: Infrastructure Health Monitor
